subject: Breaking: Clinton's allies on the left order election recount
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The far left is trying to stop President-Elect Trump. |

Friend, President-Elect Trump has issued a call for unity, which is exactly what our country needs right now. Sadly, one group would rather continue to bicker and protect the broken Washington status quo. This weekend, the Clinton campaign joined the ridiculous effort for recounts in battleground states that President-Elect Donald Trump won -- and a recount was just successfully launched in Wisconsin. Over $6 MILLION have been raised to drag our country through this meaningless recount. It’s a political ploy by the left to further divide our country, gin up support from their extremist base, and threaten President-Elect Trump’s mandate. Please contribute to our Recount Defense Fund to help us fight back against Hillary Clinton and her allies as they drag our country through a pointless recount. CONTRIBUTE $200 CONTRIBUTE $100 CONTRIBUTE $50 CONTRIBUTE $35 CONTRIBUTE $20 CONTRIBUTE $10 CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT Even Hillary’s legal counsel admitted that there is no “actionable evidence of hacking” of voting machines. This recount is nothing but a distraction -- and a preview of the lengths to which liberals are willing to go over the next four years to try to stop us. But now that the recount is set to take place, we need to be ready to fight back and win, just like we did during the campaign. With you on our side we will be successful in once again stopping Hillary and her far-left pals from dividing our country even more. Contribute $10, $25, $50, $100, $200, or more today to help. Donald Trump won in an electoral landslide, winning states and counties that no Republican won since Ronald Reagan’s triumphant victory in 1984. But liberals still can’t accept the fact that their chosen candidate lost. We should be taking this moment to unite as Americans after a brutal election and bind the wounds of our divided country. Can you imagine what would be happening if it were President-Elect Trump contesting an election that was decided three weeks ago? We know the answer... The media would be eating him alive. The American people voted for Donald Trump to, among other things, show their disgust for the games our politicians have been playing for decades -- yet this latest charade proves the left hasn't learned a single thing from the 2016 election. But now that the first recount is set to take place, we have to fight this fight. We have to ensure that the recount process is done fairly. Please contribute to our Recount Defense Fund to help us cover the costs as the far left drags our country through a pointless recount. Thank you, Chris Carr Political Director CONTRIBUTE $100

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Keep our world livable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
It's no secret that Donald Trump has talked about using nuclear weapons in Europe and against ISIS. He even suggested that more countries should get them. And he has said he would rip up the critical Iran deal, which is the best available option for preventing Iran from developing a nuclear weapon.
Luckily, we have our friends at the Council for a Livable World to lead the charge against any such policy changes.
The organization has been at the forefront of promoting sensible and progressive national security for more than 50 years. They, and the Members of Congress they've helped elect, have contributed to some of the biggest arms control achievements, including the post-Cold War U.S. nuclear test moratorium, the Chemical Weapons Convention, and numerous arms control treaties.
The Council has also helped to elect hundreds of progressive national security champions (including me!).
[**But now more than ever, we need the Council to keep our world livable. Will you donate to this outstanding organization today?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd2c/2a380d31/145d0b7b/fece07/1962852276/VEsH/ "https://secure2.convio.net/cacnp/site/Donation2;jsessionid=9C36964DC386866CF8934B230D730E51.app295a?df_id=1501&1501.donation=form1")
To effectively advocate for common-sense security policies, the Council needs to build on their expert policy research and analysis, further engage elected officials in the House and Senate, formulate strategies to drive our shared agenda, and maintain their leading voice as they inform the media and inform and mobilize citizens.
[**They can't do this alone. Will you help them keep our world livable?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd2c/2a380d31/145d0b7b/fece07/1962852276/VEsE/ "https://secure2.convio.net/cacnp/site/Donation2;jsessionid=9C36964DC386866CF8934B230D730E51.app295a?df_id=1501&1501.donation=form1")
The Council is a leader in Washington on pushing back against dangerous nuclear weapons policies and promoting sensible national security strategies. Their endorsement helped us win our Senate race here in New Hampshire, and I greatly appreciate their advice and counsel on key national security priorities.
[**Will you donate for the future of progressive national security?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd2c/2a380d31/145d0b7b/fece07/1962852276/VEsF/ "https://secure2.convio.net/cacnp/site/Donation2;jsessionid=9C36964DC386866CF8934B230D730E51.app295a?df_id=1501&1501.donation=form1")
Thank you for all you do.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd2c/2a380d31/145d0b7b/fece07/1962852276/VEsC/ "https://secure2.convio.net/cacnp/site/Donation2;jsessionid=9C36964DC386866CF8934B230D730E51.app295a?df_id=1501&1501.donation=form1")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd2c/2a380d31/145d0b7b/fece00/1962852276/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: Trey Nix, RoyCooper.com
subject: Roy's win margin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We said from the very beginning that Roy's lead would grow as the process continued. We've now almost doubled our Election Day lead of 4,979 votes.
We said from the very beginning that Roy's lead would grow as the process continued. We've now almost doubled our Election Day lead of 4,979 votes.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202b79/2fde7c66/43a73abc/15692c85/3836159351/VEsH/ "http://www.RoysWinMargin.com?utm_campaign=adv_rwmcom_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16_161128_adv_gq_rwmcom_ful__tn")
---
Friends, When we woke up this morning, Governor-elect Roy Cooper's margin of victory had stretched to 9,133 votes. We said from the very beginning that Roy's lead would grow as the process continued. We've now almost doubled our Election Day lead of 4,979 votes. If you're interested in staying up-to-date with Roy's margin, we built a new website where you can check the latest tally: **[RoysWinMargin.com](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202b79/2fde7c66/43a73abc/15692c85/3836159351/VEsE/ "http://www.RoysWinMargin.com?utm_campaign=adv_rwmcom_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16_161128_adv_gq_rwmcom_ful__tn")** Governor McCrory has consistently tried to undermine the results of this election. He's filed frivolous complaints, accused innocent people of being felons, and alleged that dead people are voting -- only to find out later that those people were, in fact, alive. **[It's time to cut out these disingenuous maneuvers and listen to the will of the people. It's time for Governor McCrory to concede.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202b79/2fde7c66/43a73abc/15692c85/3836159351/VEsF/ "http://www.RoysWinMargin.com?utm_campaign=adv_rwmcom_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16_161128_adv_gq_rwmcom_ful__tn")** Thanks for your continued support, Trey Nix
Campaign Manager
Cooper for North Carolina
